---
title: "Infographic"
author: "Helena Parsons"
date: "2026-05-27"
format: pdf
---

# 1: Loading packages
```{r}
#| label: loading-packages
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(here)
library(rstatix)
library(ggeffects)
library(corrplot)
```

# 2: Visualizations

## 2a. Reading in data
```{r}
#| label: object-for-data

job_search <- read_csv(here("data", "personal-data.csv"))
```

## 2b. First plot outside engagements

```{r}
#| label: first-visualization

ggplot(data = job_search,
                        mapping = aes(x = outside_eng,
                                      y = job_search)) +
  geom_point(color = "turquoise4",
              size = 1.5) +
  labs(title = "Affect of outside engagements on job search",
       x = "Time spent at work or school (hours)",
       y = "Time spent on job search (min)") + 
  theme_linedraw() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
         panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
```

## 2c. Stress

```{r}
#| label: second-visualization

ggplot(data = job_search,
                        mapping = aes(x = stress,
                                      y = job_search)) +
  geom_jitter(color = "darkred",
              height = 0,
              width = 0.1, 
              size = 1.5) +
  labs(title = "Affect of stress on job search",
       x = "Stress (Scale of 1-5)",
       y = "Time spent on job search (min)") +
  theme_linedraw() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
         panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
```

## 2d. Correlogram

```{r}
 
```
